text:
Remora (コバーン, Kobān) is a sharksucker Chimera Ant working under the Ortho Siblings. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 238 

Appearance

Remora has the appearance of a small yellow lizard. He has a tail fin similar to a fish and what appears to be a shell on his back—but could be a sucker-like organ/membrane.

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

As Killua fights off a shark Chimera Ant; Remora attaches the Bar Double Bull badge onto him and reports his deed to the Ortho Siblings. His whereabouts are currently unknown.

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The original name of the character, Kobān (コバーン), is almost identical to koban (コバン), the Japanese name for remora (suckerfish); Remora being the name used in Viz translation since this Chimera Ant looks like one. However, perhaps due to the discrepancy between the character's name and the animal's name, in Crunchyroll version the name was translated in a way that is a little more faithful (phonetically) to the original—Coburn.
